---
title: "Deschutes County, Oregon Transfer System Cost/Operational Analysis"
subtitle: "2022-2023"
number: 20
image: /images/deschutes_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Deschutes County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2023 Transfer and Transport Systems Analysis

# 2021 Transfer and Transport Systems Analysis

:::
